title: stachys ochroleuca
intro: Stachys ochroleuca, also known as Wood Betony or Yellow Hedge Nettle, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Stachys ochroleuca include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Stachys ochroleuca can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
